objections.description: Missing Component Architecture Map. The spec lists 'component architecture map' as a required deliverable but fails to provide the actual hierarchical structure, data flow patterns, and component ownership boundaries. Without visualizing how features/search, features/document, and features/action-sheet compose with shared/ui primitives, convergence criteria for component structure cannot be verified. The directory structure alone is insufficient to understand parent-child relationships and state ownership.
objections.suggested_fix: Add Section 1.5: Component Architecture Map containing: (1) Hierarchical tree diagram showing App → Routes → Screens → Components with depth indicators, (2) Data flow arrows distinguishing local state, React Context, and URL state, (3) Code-splitting boundaries marked with lazy() call sites, (4) Shared component inventory table with usage frequency and variant definitions.

objections.description: Action Sheet interaction pattern critically undefined for accessibility compliance. Described only as an 'overlay within DocumentScreen' but lacks: (1) Focus trap implementation (Tab cycling within modal), (2) Body scroll lock mechanism (preventing background scroll), (3) Gesture specification (swipe-down-to-dismiss velocity threshold), (4) Escape key handling, (5) ARIA attributes (aria-modal='true', role='dialog', aria-labelledby). This blocks accessibility compliance approval.
objections.suggested_fix: Define ActionSheet accessibility specification: (1) Implement focus trap using ref management with Tab/Shift+Tab boundary detection, (2) document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden' on mount with cleanup, (3) Pointer event handlers for vertical swipe with 300px/s velocity threshold to dismiss, (4) useEffect keydown listener for Escape key, (5) Mandatory ARIA attributes on container div.

objections.description: Missing loading, empty, and error state architectures. The spec defines happy-path UI but omits: (1) Skeleton screen structures for Dashboard list items and Document content areas, (2) Empty state design for zero search results (illustration + copy + CTA), (3) Error boundary fallback UI for API failures with retry mechanisms. This prevents approval of visual hierarchy and accessibility compliance (screen readers must announce loading states).
objections.suggested_fix: Add Section 6: State Specifications with: (1) Skeleton components using CSS gradient animation (respecting prefers-reduced-motion), (2) EmptyState component with consistent illustration placeholder and action button, (3) ErrorBoundary with user-friendly messaging and 'Try Again' functionality, (4) Loading state announcements via aria-live regions.

objections.description: Navigation flow and wayfinding not specified. While wouter manages URLs, the UX lacks: (1) Transition directionality (Dashboard → Detail slides left, Back slides right?), (2) Deep linking strategy for Action Sheet (should /document/123/action be routable or state-only?), (3) Browser back button behavior vs in-app back navigation consistency, (4) Title/heading update strategy per route for screen reader context changes.
objections.suggested_fix: Add Section 1.6: Navigation Flow Specification: (1) Define spatial model (stack-based navigation with horizontal slide transitions), (2) Specify that Action Sheet remains state-only (not in URL) to avoid deep-link complexity, (3) Document that browser back button triggers same animation as in-app back button, (4) Require useDocumentTitle hook updates for route announcements.

objections.description: Search interaction architecture undefined despite backend endpoints existing. Missing: (1) Debounce timing for /api/autocomplete (risk of request spam), (2) Keyboard navigation through suggestions (ArrowDown/ArrowUp/Enter/Tab), (3) Highlighting strategy for matched query text in suggestions, (4) Mobile keyboard dismissal triggers (on scroll? on result select?).
objections.suggested_fix: Add Search Interaction Specification: (1) Implement 300ms debounce using useDebounce hook, (2) Keyboard handler for ↓/↑ to navigate, Enter to select, Escape to close, (3) Highlight component wrapping matched substrings in <mark> with aria-label reading full text, (4) Blur input on result selection to dismiss mobile keyboard.

suggestions.description: Add safe area inset handling for mobile viewports. The layout shell must account for iOS notch/Dynamic Island using env(safe-area-inset-top) and bottom bar using env(safe-area-inset-bottom) to prevent content obscuration.

Specify URL path strategy for the parallel deploy. If legacy is at / and v2 is at /v2/, relative API calls and asset loading must be verified to not break when base path changes during Phase 2 cutover.

Define reduced motion alternative behaviors. Instead of just setting duration to 0ms, specify instant opacity changes for screen transitions when prefers-reduced-motion is detected, maintaining wayfinding without vestibular triggers.
